items.title: [正面] As everyone metions in the other reviews, It is in...
items.summary:
As everyone metions in the other reviews, It is indeed a gacha take on roguelike deckbuilders like Slay the Spire, although it works a bit differently, you have two different types of progression in the gameplay:

Gacha Progression: Every team consists of 4 characters, of which they have their own 5 base cards and however many derivative cards in their kit + Exalt (Ultimate), all of those will scale on the level of the character (their stats) and the level of the cards (scalings and flat values), the duplicates for the characters may also add additional effects to their cards and kits, with breakpoints at 1,2,3 and 7 copies.

Roguelike Progression: These are for the combat instances of the game, some have multiple battles and events, where you can upgrade your cards during that exploration, remove them, add different state and effect cards, and get relics that give you additional effects (the relics scale with account level and how many Posses - MC Ultimates - you have), those give buffs to help you along the combats and are removed at the end of the exploration after defeating the boss.

You can play and chill on this game for quite a bit of the early and mid game, but on the later parts you'll feel more pressed to read and understand what you are doing to clear the late game and endgame content without having to retry thousands of times, the info on the internet about Morimens is quite scarce but there are discord servers in english and chinese that have some helpful people in case you are having trouble with the game.

The game is still in process of refining the translations manually with volunteers and with a third party staff to fix any of the errors caused by the Chat GPT translation, but as the game has a small team, it might take some time to have it fully fixed. From my personal experience, outside of some names being written and translated in different ways, and some female characters ending up with male pronouns, the Chat GPT translations didn't break or make anything incomprehensible in the story, although at some points you may have to contemplate a little to fully grasp what is going on.

items.title:
[负面] WENN DIESE ÜBERSETZUNG NICHT WÄRE

Selten so eine ...
items.summary:
WENN DIESE ÜBERSETZUNG NICHT WÄRE

Selten so eine schlimme KI Überserzung gesehen. Dagegen ist die Google Übersetzung Premium. MAn versteht von der Story nichts so schlecht ist das.

Das Gameplay an sich ist stark, Wer Slay a Spire mag wird auch das mögen. Aber auch nur wenn man eine Story nicht braucht. Und für mich ist es so unspielbar, weil man nichts checkt.

items.title: [正面] by far my favorite gacha, be warned there is two t...
items.summary: by far my favorite gacha, be warned there is two things i would say you should know before playing at times the translation can be very iffy and this game gets brutal at around the chapter 4-5 mark. If you can handle both those things then enjoy this amazing game.
